svg.title: Fraud Detection Data Pipeline Architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end data pipeline from CSV ingestion through Spark, GCS, BigQuery, dbt transformation, Airflow orchestration, and Looker Studio dashboard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the PaySim dataset')
sendPrompt('Explain what the Spark job does in this pipeline')
g.text: Clean, rename, feature engineer → 16 parquet files

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is stored in GCS in this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does the BigQuery raw table look like?')
sendPrompt('Explain the dbt transformation layers in this project')
sendPrompt('What charts are in the Looker Studio dashboard?')
g.text: KPIs, fraud by type, risk distribution

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What tasks does the Airflow DAG run?')

svg.text: Click any component to learn more
